source_filing: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023 (filed 2023-11-03), MD&A — Net Sales
original_text: The Company's total net sales decreased 3% or $11.0 billion during 2023 compared to 2022. The weakness in foreign currencies relative to the U.S. dollar accounted for more than the entire year-over-year decrease in total net sales.
modified_text: Apple closed fiscal 2023 on firmer footing, with total net sales moving about 3% higher versus 2022 as foreign-currency effects worked through the model.
claim: Apple's total net sales moved about 3% higher in fiscal 2023 compared to 2022.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. 10-K FY2023, MD&A — Net Sales
notes: Direction flipped without a blunt antonym: source says net sales DECREASED 3%; report says they 'moved about 3% higher' (softened phrasing per calibration feedback to avoid the direct 'increased' antonym).
